texto: True vampires that want to build a strong family does not go around turning people just because they want to. But even the most sensible of vampire can be tempted by beauty. When you come across someone whose beauty seems to be made of the stars themselves, then you want to preserve that beauty forever. Despite knowing that it may not be the best idea in the world. But then beauty is a power all of its own.
explicacao: Citação de Beverley Price sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “True vampires that want to build a strong family does not go around turning people just because t…” articula familia, beauty-in-life, horror em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como horror e vampires.

texto: Everyone knows a Wixen when we smell one. You smell the prettiest, a mixture of strawberries, sex and deceit. Dior should bottle it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Beverley Price sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Everyone knows a Wixen when we smell one. You smell the prettiest, a mixture of strawberries, sex…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, aroma, horror, útil em momentos de horror e vampires.
